Using selectFrom(LINK) fetches all columns from the LINK table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and reduce performance. Consider explicitly selecting only the required columns using select(LINK.ID, LINK.URL, ...).from(LINK).
Using selectFrom(LINK) fetches all columns from the LINK table, which may include columns not needed by the caller. Consider explicitly selecting only the columns required for the Link model.
Using LINK.fields() selects all columns from the LINK table, which is equivalent to SELECT *. Consider explicitly listing only the columns needed for the Link class.
Using CHAT.fields() selects all columns from the CHAT table, which is equivalent to SELECT *. Consider explicitly listing only the columns needed for the Chat class.
